name: Metal Vanity Flip Mirror with Tray Black - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Swivel, 2-Sided, Desk/Table Use
description:
Add eye-catching style and versatility to your dressing table with this Metal Vanity Flip Mirror with Tray from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. The rectangular mirror features a flip design that lets you switch from regular mirror to magnifying mirror for checking your makeup, tweezing eyebrows and much more, while the attached tray on the base provides space to keep small items organized. Whether you keep it on your bathroom counter or your bedroom vanity, you'll always have the views you need to fine-tune your look with this flip mirror.

Celebrate the everyday with Hearth & Hand — created exclusively for Target in collaboration with Magnolia, a home and lifestyle brand by Chip & Joanna Gaines. Built upon our shared commitment to giving back to our communities, these pieces reveal the beauty of everyday moments shared with family and friends.
